Notes: Westfield State University Holiday Tournament Opening Round.
Wellesley advances to play Westfield State tomorrow at 3pm in Championship.
Colby-Sawyer will play St. Joseph tomorrow at 1pm in consolation game.
Game.Officials: Gary Zavatkay,  Lynda Kashouh,  Thomas Leahy
